title: System and method for managing and orchestrating a collaboration peripheral device workspace with adaptive meshes
abstract: A peripheral device workspace cloud orchestrator server includes a hardware processor, a memory device, and a network interface device to receive operational capabilities and settings associated with a peripheral device node operatively coupled to an anchor information handling system node, the anchor information handling system node and peripheral device forming part of a collaborative peripheral device workspace to be registered with the peripheral device workspace cloud orchestrator server. The hardware processor executes a collaborative workspace orchestrator module to register the peripheral device node within the collaborative peripheral device workspace. The hardware processor executes computer code of mesh manager module to identify and create a mesh within the collaborative peripheral device workspace including the anchor information handling system node and registered peripheral device node in a mesh manifest, the mesh created based on the KPIs of the registered peripheral device and assigned a mesh ID value.
claims: 1. A peripheral device workspace cloud orchestrator server, comprising: a hardware processor; a memory device; a power management unit (PMU) to provide power to the hardware processor and memory device; a network interface device to receive operational capabilities and settings associated with a plurality of peripheral devices operatively coupled to an anchor information handling system node at a location, the anchor information handling system node and a peripheral device workspace manifest of peripheral device nodes for the peripheral devices at the location with a location identifier forming part of a collaborative peripheral device workspace to be registered with the peripheral device workspace cloud orchestrator server; the hardware processor to execute computer-readable program code of a collaborative workspace orchestrator module to register the peripheral device among the manifest of peripheral device nodes and the anchor information handling system node within the collaborative peripheral device workspace, assign a collaborative peripheral device workspace identification value for the location to the created collaborative peripheral device workspace, create the peripheral device workspace manifest of the peripheral device as a peripheral device node and the anchor information handling system node within the collaborative peripheral device workspace, and receive hardware device key performance indicators (KPIs) that describe operational capabilities, performance metrics, and operating characteristics of the registered peripheral device node; and the hardware processor to execute computer code of mesh manager module to identify and create a mesh within the collaborative peripheral device workspace including the anchor information handling system node and registered peripheral device nodes, the mesh created based on the KPIs of the registered peripheral device and assigned a mesh ID value.
